name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Chicago's Cash America Pawn on S Kedzie Ave offers quick pawn loans and lending services to South Side residents in IL.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is located at 4812 S Kedzie Ave in Chicago, IL, serving the South Side community with convenient pawn and lending services. The Kedzie Ave location operates Monday through Friday from 10AM to 6PM and Saturday from 10AM to 5PM, providing flexible access for Chicago residents who need quick cash solutions.

This Chicago pawn shop specializes in providing quick cash loans, allowing customers to pawn items of value or access fast lending services. You can reach the location directly at +1 773-523-2895 to discuss your pawn options or inquire about current lending rates and terms.

When visiting the S Kedzie Ave location in Chicago, bring a valid government-issued ID and the item you wish to pawn. Most customers use Cash America Pawn for immediate cash needs, whether for unexpected expenses or to leverage existing items. The staff can guide you through the simple pawn process.
pros: Non-recourse pawn loans — default only costs the collateral, no credit impact or collections
3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America for broad accessibility
Accepts a wide range of collateral: jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments
Dedicated gold, silver, and platinum buying program with cash paid on the spot
Layaway available on retail purchases with just 10% down
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) — regulated and financially stable
AFF subsidiary offers lease-to-own financing at 15,000+ merchant partner locations
cons: Pawn loan fees and interest rates are typically very high — often equivalent to triple-digit APRs
Loan amounts offered are usually a fraction of an item's actual market value
Item valuation is entirely at the store's discretion with no standardized offer
Customers must physically visit a store — no online loan or transaction capability
Forfeiting unredeemed collateral is a real financial loss if funds are unavailable at loan maturity
best_for: Cash-constrained consumers who need immediate funds and cannot qualify for traditional credit
Individuals selling gold, silver, or platinum jewelry for quick liquidity
Bargain shoppers seeking discounted electronics, tools, instruments, or jewelry
Borrowers who want a loan with zero credit check and zero collections risk
diagnosis: FirstCash/Cash America is the right fit for consumers who need fast, no-credit-check cash and have a valuable item to pledge, or for bargain shoppers hunting discounted resale merchandise. The main caveat is cost: pawn loan effective APRs are high, and pledged items are typically valued well below their resale price, so this is a last-resort borrowing tool rather than a cost-effective one.
services: Non-recourse pawn loans secured by personal property
Outright purchase of customer items for immediate cash
Gold, silver, and platinum buying program
Retail resale of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Store locator for 2,500+ U.S. and Latin America locations
Lease-to-own payment solutions via AFF subsidiary
Retail finance for consumer goods through 15,000+ AFF merchant partners
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 4812 S Kedzie Ave, Chicago, IL. Fast pawn loans and lending services for South Side residents.
